---
title: "PHN Modeling Competition"
author: "North Carpenter"
date: "2026-03-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(car)
library(glmnet)
library(sandwich)
library(patchwork)
```

Import Training Data
```{r}
#Training Lables
tran.lab <- read.csv("Training_Set_Lables.csv")
#Training Values
tran.value <- read.csv("Training_Set_Values.csv")
```

First Look Data
```{r}
head(tran.lab)
head(tran.value)
```

Joining Data
```{r}
# Inner join
tran.dat <- inner_join(tran.lab, tran.value, by = join_by(id))
head(tran.dat)
nrow(tran.dat)
summary(tran.dat)

# Count NAs
tran.dat %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "column", values_to = "value") %>%
  group_by(column) %>%
  summarise(
    num_missing = sum(is.na(value) | value == "", na.rm = TRUE),
    num_unique  = n_distinct(value)
  )

missings <- 

# Unique In Each Column
sapply(tran.dat, unique)


# List of Columns to Drop
drop <- c("recorded_by", # Only has one unique value in the whole column
          )
```
